title: Standards for Protection Against Laser Radiation

315.10.title: Purpose
315.10.description: Establishes standards for protection against laser radiation

315.20.title: Scope
315.20.applies_to: Any location/facility where laser systems are produced, stored, disposed of, or used

315.30.title: Incorporations by Reference
standards: ANSI Z136.3 (Safe Use of Lasers in Health Care Facilities)

installation_registration.requirement: Register before placing installation in operation
required_info: Classification number and room location of laser systems
Name of designated laser safety officer

out_of_state_facilities.10_day_notice: Written notice at least 10 working days before use
requirements: Include nature, duration, scope of use
out_of_state_facilities.inspection: Pre-operational inspection may be required within 24 hours

training_areas: Biological effects on eye and skin

duties: Establish and implement laser radiation safety program
Ensure hazard instructions provided to exposed individuals
Permit operation only by trained individuals with SOP access
Ensure laser systems meet requirements and control measures in effect
Periodically audit functionality of control measures

exemptions: Certified Class 1, Class 2, Class 2a and Class 3a lasers
Embedded Class 3b or Class 4 lasers with lower classification
Laser systems in transit per transportation agency rules

topics: Use of laser protective devices and eyewear

requirements: Proper condition with required optical density
Examined every 6 months by LSO or designee

entertainment_laser_light_show.advance_notice: 10 working days in writing or facsimile
required_info: Name, address, phone of person in charge
Sketches of location, beam paths, reflective surfaces
safe_operation_requirements: Emissions outside 400-700nm shall not exceed Class 1 limits
Audience area shall not exceed Class 1 limits
Operators/performers not intended to view: shall not exceed Class 2
Areas above Class 2: posted with warning signs and barriers
Scanning lasers: no audience exposure above Class 1 during failures
Mirror ball: meet conditions when stationary or during failure
Direct supervision required except for low power or height/side separations

height_requirements.unattended: 6 meters above audience OR 2.5m lateral separation

trigger: Partial or total loss of sight

incident_reporting.written_report: Within 30 days for any incident requiring notification

caution_signs.class_3b: LASER RADIATION - AVOID DIRECT EXPOSURE TO BEAM
caution_signs.class_4: LASER RADIATION - AVOID EYE OR SKIN EXPOSURE TO DIRECT OR SCATTERED RADIATION
